Localization.Description: An administrator account action is performed. Administrator account actions can save or extend access to systems and lead to security policy bypass

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Administrator {subject.account.name} changed object {object.account.name} of "administrator" type on the Dr.Web management server
Administrator {subject.account.name} deleted object {object.account.name} of "administrator" type on the Dr.Web management server
Administrator {subject.account.name} created object {object.account.name} of "administrator" type on the Dr.Web management server
